title: Signal Before Sense: An Information-Theoretic Authenticity Assessment of the Voynich Manuscript
description: An honest information-theoretic characterization of the Voynich Manuscript (Beinecke MS 408) that is explicitly NOT a decipherment. It answers two prior questions without reading the text: whether the manuscript carries information at all, and what kind of machine produced it. Several established results are reproduced independently with a single consistent pipeline; failed decipherment cribs are reported as first-class results. Includes the papers (English and Spanish), interactive generators, and the full analysis code. Produced with disclosed AI assistance as a computational tool.
